---
title: "{{< i18n vsm_label >}}"
---

## Purpose of This Document

This document maps **technical execution activities** to **business value and
strategic outcomes**, ensuring alignment between:

- Petrobras Subsea (SUB) strategic objectives
- NOAA (internal SUB unit) validation and partnership
- AI / Computer Vision technical implementation
- PMBOK-governed project execution

This artifact establishes the **strategic contract** between business, science,
and technology, and is the mandatory reference for Planning and Execution
phases.

---

# Value Stream — From Technical Capability to Business Value {.unnumbered}

## Value Stream Principle

> **No technical component exists unless it directly supports one or more Key
> Results of OKR 2.1.**

---

## End-to-End Value Stream Mapping

### Data Ingestion (AUV Images & Metadata)

**Technical Scope**

- Batch ingestion of AUV images
- Metadata and spatial data capture
- Dataset versioning

**Value Contribution**

- Enables KR1, KR2, KR5
- Scalable onboarding of inspection campaigns

---

### Preprocessing & Quality Normalization

**Technical Scope**

- Resolution normalization
- Lighting and contrast correction
- Removal of unusable frames

**Value Contribution**

- Supports KR3
- Reduces noise and increases screening reliability

---

### AI-Assisted Annotation (Human-in-the-Loop)

**Technical Scope**

- Assisted labeling
- Iterative refinement with SMEs

**Value Contribution**

- Enables KR1 and KR3
- Reduces expert effort while preserving authority

---

### Model Training & Inference (AI/CV)

**Technical Scope**

- Computer Vision model training
- Precision-oriented inference
- Offline batch execution

**Value Contribution**

- Core enabler of KR1, KR2, KR3
- Primary automation value-add

---

### Validation & Quality Control

**Technical Scope**

- Performance monitoring
- SME validation loops
- Error analysis

**Value Contribution**

- Protects KR3
- Controls operational and environmental risk

---

### Curated Output & Digital Asset Consolidation

**Technical Scope**

- Versioned datasets
- Model artifacts
- Traceability metadata

**Value Contribution**

- Directly fulfills KR4 and KR5
- Converts project output into a corporate asset

---

## Governance Rule (Binding)

> Every WBS element, technical decision, and architectural component **must be
> traceable to at least one KR of [OKR at section @sec-okr]**.

---

## Strategic Summary

[OKR at section @sec-okr] transforms AI/CV from a technical initiative into a
**measurable value delivery mechanism** for Petrobras Subsea.

This document is the **authoritative strategic reference** for:

- Planning decisions
- Scope control
- Prioritization trade-offs
- Executive reporting
